headline: Jim Cramer on Corteva, Inc.: “I Would Continue to Own the Stock”

headline: Regeneron (REGN) and Sanofi Announce Dupixent Approval in Japan to Treat Bullous Pemphigoid
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) is one of the 8 Best Debt Free Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 24, 2026, Regeneron Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ:REGN) and Sanofi (SNY) announced that Japan’s Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare approved Dupixent for the treatment of adults with moderate-to-severe bullous pemphigoid. The approval is based on data from […]

headline: Maze Therapeutics: MZE829 Presses Forward Despite Stock Price Drop
summary: I believe the market overreacted to Maze Therapeutics (MAZE) after strong Phase 2 HORIZON data for MZE829 in APOL1 kidney disease. Read the latest analysis on the stock here.

headline: 2 Large-Cap Stocks with Exciting Potential and 1 Facing Headwinds
summary: Large-cap stocks have the power to shape entire industries thanks to their size and widespread influence. With such vast footprints, however, finding new areas for growth is much harder than for smaller, more agile players.
